title: TodoWrite
description: A planning tool makes the agent's intended work visible and keeps long tasks from drifting.

steps.content: Refactor the parser and add a regression test.
steps.annotation: The task has multiple steps, so planning should become visible.
The model records a plan before acting.
The current todo list is kept by the harness.
Normal tools continue through the same dispatch table.

steps.content: <reminder>Update todo status after 3 rounds without todo_write.</reminder>
steps.annotation: The nag reminder keeps the plan fresh during long work.

steps.content: I inspected the parser and will update the todo list before making the code change.
steps.annotation: The planning state guides the next turn.
